name_en: Caffè Gilli (Historic Pastry and Coffee House)

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si paga per i cornetti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see PAH-gah per ee kor-NEH-ttee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the cashier, near the entrance.

responses.english: At the cashier, near the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa una tazza di cappuccino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah OO-nah TAT-sah dee kap-poo-CHEE-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated in the menu.

responses.english: It is indicated in the menu.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il bagno per i clienti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel BAH-nyoh per ee klee-EN-tee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the back on the left.

responses.english: At the back on the left.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un tavolo libero per due, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon TAH-voh-loh LEE-beh-roh per DOO-eh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the moment there are none.

responses.english: At the moment there are none.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiudete oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh ah kay OR-ah kyoo-DAY-tay OJ-jee per fa-VOR-ay
